column1: # Cook County IL (17031) HUD CHAS cost-burden-by-race fixture (2016-2020 ACS 5-year).
# Household counts are curated published cells from Cook County Consolidated Plan 2025-2029 Table 20
# Share is computed in the mapper as cost_burden_gt30_households / total_households × 100 (one decimal).
# Universe: occupied households (owners + renters); householder race alone NH; burden >30% of income.
